MINI MINUTES: Robert Gates appeared for Plaintiff; also present Mark Gainer. Mark Gainer was sworn and testified for Plaintiff. After hearing the evidence and argument of counsel, the Court awards judgment to Plaintiff and against Defendants Ronald Jordan and Margaret Shaw, and each of them, in the sum of $43,754.50. Judge: Diane Wick; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Candace Yount. (D. 611)
